since_last: 30% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.68%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.35% · BTC +0.37% · Gold -1.08% · Nasdaq100 -1.63%. 30% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.68%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.68%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +3.74%, TTD +3.07%, WDAY +2.50%, CRM +2.17%. Laggards: ARM -8.58%, MRVL -7.29%, APP -6.52%, MU -6.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.10% at $140.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
